name: n8n-bridge
description: Secure bridge for triggering local n8n workflows through the n8n API wrapper with vault-managed tokens.
capability_summary: Triggers n8n workflows via the n8n CLI wrapper and deterministic JSON outputs.

parameters.name: workflow
parameters.description: Workflow identifier passed to n8n trigger.

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: JSON payload or payload file reference for the workflow trigger.
